title: elymus angsaiensis
intro: Elymus angsaiensis, also known as the Angsai wild grass or Chinese wildrye, is a type of perennial grass native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Elymus angsaiensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of Elymus angsaiensis include infusions, decoctions, and powders, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and digestive issues.
